description_long: This is a large, modern modular wall unit cabinet and shelving system, primarily constructed from two-tone wood panels in light beige and dark brown. The structure features multiple compartments, including tall vertical cabinets, horizontal cupboards, open shelves, and several drawers, all equipped with sleek metallic handles. The left side incorporates a series of open shelves and a horizontal cabinet above, while the right side is dominated by a tall, vertical storage unit. The central section is open, likely designed for a television or display area, flanked by additional storage below and to the sides. The overall design is geometric and functional, suitable for living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and the construction suggests a sturdy, freestanding piece.
description: A large, two-tone modular wall unit with multiple cabinets, drawers, and open shelves, featuring metallic handles and a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all compartments, including cabinets, drawers, open shelves, and the central open space.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth and thickness of the unit, with no visible compartments or handles.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view highlighting the solid panel construction and the geometric layout of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered depth of the shelves and cabinets, with some handles partially visible.
